notes: Data Transfer Out to Internet — tiered pricing per cloud. Verified May 2026 from each cloud's published rates. OCI's 10 TB/month free egress is its single biggest cost differentiator vs the hyperscalers. Free tier (free_tier_gb) is consumed first; remaining usage fills tiers in order, each priced at price_per_gb_usd up to up_to_gb (cumulative). Final tier with up_to_gb=null applies to all overage. inter_region_per_gb_usd is the rate for cross-region transfer within the same cloud (e.g. us-east-1 → us-west-2). Inter-region transfer typically has NO free tier (Always Free egress applies only to internet).

gcp._notes: GCP doesn't have a flat 100GB-free tier like AWS/Azure; Always Free accounts get 200GB but that's account-level not service-level. We model 0 free for fairer comparison.

oci._notes: OCI's 10 TB/month free egress is its single biggest cost differentiator. Beyond 10 TB, it's $0.0085/GB — roughly 10x cheaper than AWS/Azure/GCP at the same volume.
